description: This file defines the SmsProvider interface, which specifies a contract for sending SMS notifications within the BusinessLoanAPI Spring Boot application.

classes.name: SmsProvider
classes.description: An interface for sending SMS messages. Implementations should handle the actual message transmission and are expected to be best-effort, only throwing exceptions for unrecoverable configuration errors.

methods.name: send
methods.description: Send an SMS notification based on the provided NotificationRequest, destination phone number in E.164 format, and message content.
